ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Polling is an additional mechanism to detect file changes.
ast.target: 轮询是一种用于检测文件更改的附加机制。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The lower the value, the more CPU-intensive the plugin will be.
ast.target: 值越低，插件占用的 CPU 资源就越多。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The higher the value, the more delay might occur to detect the missed file changes.
ast.target: 值越高，检测到遗漏的文件更改可能产生的延迟就越大。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Use 0 to disable polling.
ast.target: 使用 0 来禁用轮询。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The timeout to distinguish deletion and rename events.
ast.target: 用于区分删除和重命名事件的超时时间。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Rename events are often a pair of create/delete events, which do not require this timeout.
ast.target: 重命名事件通常是一对创建/删除事件，不需要此超时。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: However, in some rare cases, the events are sent in a reverse delete/create order, where this timeout will be needed to correctly detect the rename event.
ast.target: 然而，在某些罕见情况下，事件会以相反的删除/创建顺序发送，此时需要此超时来正确检测重命名事件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Use 0 to disable this timeout.
ast.target: 使用 0 来禁用此超时。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only canvas changes are supported for canvas files
ast.target: 画布文件仅支持画布更改

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node not found
ast.target: 未找到节点

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node text is not a string
ast.target: 节点文本不是字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unsupported file change
ast.target: 不支持的文件更改

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is maintained with support from Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙
ast.target: 🌐 i18next 的维护得到了 Locize 的支持 — 考虑使用托管本地化（AI、CDN、集成）为您的项目提供动力：https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to trigger a link update when a file is renamed externally
ast.target: 当文件在外部被重命名时，是否触发链接更新

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Should update links
ast.target: 应更新链接

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Polling interval in milliseconds
ast.target: 轮询间隔（毫秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Deletion/rename detection timeout in milliseconds
ast.target: 删除/重命名检测超时（毫秒）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用一次 init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next was not initialized
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next 未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译
